title: campanula macrorhiza f. nicaeensis
intro: Campanula macrorhiza f. nicaeensis, also known as the variegated bellflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bellflower family native to North America. The medicinal properties of Campanula macrorhiza f. nicaeensis include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Campanula macrorhiza f. nicaeensis can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
